name: Pet
desc: Represents a pet that is a patient of a veterinary clinic.

name: ID
desc: Counter used to assign a unique ID to each new pet.

name: Pet.new
desc: Creates a Pet and keeps ID ahead of the highest existing database ID.

name: birthday
desc: The birthday of the pet (e.g. 2020-03-15).

name: colour
desc: The colour of the pet.

name: id
desc: Primary key — unique identifier for each pet.

name: name
desc: The name of the pet.

name: ownerID
desc: The ID of the owner of this pet.

name: species
desc: The species of the pet (e.g. cat, dog, bird).

name: PetDAO
desc: Data Access Object for Pet database operations.

name: deletePet
desc: Deletes a pet from the database.

name: getAllPets
desc: Returns all pets from the database.

name: insertPet
desc: Inserts a new pet into the database.

name: updatePet
desc: Updates an existing pet in the database.

name: databaseBuilder
desc:
Creates a database builder for a persistent database.
Once a database is built, you should keep a reference to it and re-use it.

name: inMemoryDatabaseBuilder
desc:
Creates a database builder for an in memory database.
Information stored in an in memory database disappears when the process is killed.
Once a database is built, you should keep a reference to it and re-use it.

name: addCallback
desc: Adds a database Callback to the builder.

name: addMigrations
desc: Adds migrations to the builder.

name: build
desc: Creates the database and initializes it.

name: PetDatabase
desc: Floor database for the Pet section — version 1, entity is Pet.

name: petDAO
desc: The DAO used to access pet data.

name: PetOwnerPage
desc: This is the main page for Pet Owners

name: createState
desc: Creates the mutable state for this widget at a given location in the tree.

name: PetPage
desc: Pet management page — add, view, update, and delete pets.

name: createState
desc: Creates the mutable state for this widget at a given location in the tree.

name: PetPageState
desc: State for PetPage.

name: DetailsPage
desc: Shows the selected pet's details with Update, Delete, and Close buttons.

name: ListPage
desc: Shows the input form at the top and the scrollable pet list below.

name: birthdayController
desc: Controller for the birthday field.

name: build
desc: Builds the Scaffold with the AppBar, language buttons, and help icon.

name: clearForm
desc: Clears all form fields.

name: colourController
desc: Controller for the colour field.

name: copyAlert
desc: Asks the user if they want to copy the previous pet's saved data into the form.

name: dao
desc: DAO used to run database operations on the Pet table.

name: deleteAlert
desc: Asks the user to confirm before deleting the selected pet.

name: dispose
desc: Disposes all controllers to free memory.

name: helpAlert
desc: Shows instructions on how to use this page.

name: initState
desc: Sets up controllers, prefs, loads saved field values, and opens the database.

name: loadDatabase
desc: Opens the database and loads all pets into petList.

name: nameController
desc: Controller for the name field.

name: ownerIDController
desc: Controller for the owner ID field.

name: petList
desc: List of all pets loaded from the database.

name: prefs
desc: Encrypted storage for saving form values between sessions.

name: reactiveLayout
desc: Returns a tablet or phone layout depending on screen size.

name: saveToPrefs
desc: Saves all form field values to encrypted shared preferences.

name: selectedItem
desc: Currently selected pet — null if nothing is selected.

name: speciesController
desc: Controller for the species field.

name: translate
desc: Returns the translated string for the given key.

name: Vaccine
desc: Represents a Vaccine entity stored in the local database.

name: Vaccine.new
desc: Constructor used to initialize a Vaccine object.

name: dosage
desc: Dosage information for the vaccine.

name: expiryDate
desc: Expiry date of the vaccine.

name: globalID
desc:
Static counter used to generate unique IDs
when creating new vaccine records.

name: id
desc:
Unique identifier for each vaccine record.
This is the primary key in the database table.

name: lotNumber
desc: Lot number associated with the vaccine batch.

name: name
desc: Name of the vaccine (e.g., Pfizer, Moderna).

name: VaccineDao
desc: Data Access Object (DAO) for the Vaccine entity.

name: deleteVaccine
desc: Deletes a specific vaccine record from the database.

name: findAllVaccines
desc: Retrieves all vaccine records from the database.

name: insertVaccine
desc: Inserts a new vaccine record into the database.

name: updateVaccine
desc: Updates an existing vaccine record in the database.

name: VaccinePage
desc:
Displays the vaccine management interface, including form entry,
vaccine listing, responsive detail views, and CRUD operations.

name: createState
desc: Creates the mutable state for this widget at a given location in the tree.

name: VaccinePageState
desc:
Manages the state, database access, form controllers,
and responsive vaccine UI behavior.

name: DetailsPage
desc:
Displays the detail view for the selected vaccine item,
along with delete and close actions.

name: ListPage
desc: Builds the main vaccine form and vaccine list interface.

name: build
desc: Builds the vaccine page scaffold and displays the responsive layout.

name: dao
desc: Data access object for vaccine operations.

name: database
desc: Floor database instance used for vaccine persistence.

name: dispose
desc: Called when this object is removed from the tree permanently.

name: dosageController
desc: Controller for the dosage field.

name: expiryDateController
desc: Controller for the expiry date field.

name: initState
desc: Called when this object is inserted into the tree.

name: loadData
desc: Loads all vaccine records from the database and refreshes the UI.

name: loadSavedData
desc:
Loads previously saved vaccine entry from encrypted storage
and populates the form fields if data exists.

name: lotNumberController
desc: Controller for the lot number field.

name: nameController
desc: Controller for the vaccine name field.

name: prefs
desc: Secure storage for persisting last entered vaccine data.

name: reactiveLayout
desc:
Returns a responsive layout that shows a side-by-side interface
on wider screens and a single-page flow on smaller screens.

name: selectedItem
desc: Currently selected vaccine item for detail display and editing.

name: showHelpDialog
desc: Displays a help dialog explaining how to use the interface.

name: showSaveDialog
desc:
Prompts the user to save or discard the entered vaccine data
for reuse in future sessions.

name: updateVaccine
desc:
Updates the selected vaccine entry in the database using
the current values entered in the form fields.

name: vaccineList
desc: In-memory list of vaccine records loaded from the database.

name: createState
desc: Creates the mutable state for this widget at a given location in the tree.

name: DetailsPageDesktop
desc: Displays selected veterinarian details with desktop layout.

name: DetailsPageMobile
desc: Displays selected veterinarian details with mobile layout, which includes text fields.

name: ListPage
desc: Builds the main input form and veterinarian list view.

name: addAlert
desc: Displays a dialog asking the user if they want to reuse previously entered form values.

name: addButton
desc: Builds an "Add" button for creating a new veterinarian entry.

name: addressController
desc: Controller for the veterinarian address input field.

name: birthdayController
desc: Controller for the veterinarian birthday input field.

name: build
desc: Builds the main UI scaffold including app bar and localized controls while using the reactive layout as the body.

name: dao
desc: Data access object for performing database operations for the Veterinarians table.

name: dispose
desc: Cleans up controllers when the widget is removed to prevent memory leaks.

name: helpAlert
desc: Displays a help dialog explaining how to properly use the veterinarian form.

name: initState
desc: Initializes controllers, loads saved preferences, sets default locale, and loads database data.

name: loadDatabase
desc: Loads the database and retrieves all veterinarians, updating the UI with the results.

name: nameController
desc: Controller for the veterinarian name input field.

name: prefs
desc: Secure storage for saving user input between sessions.

name: reactiveLayout
desc: Builds a responsive layout depending on screen size and orientation.

name: selectedItem
desc: Currently selected veterinarian.

name: universityController
desc: Controller for the veterinarian university input field.

name: updateAndDeleteButtons
desc: Builds Update and Delete buttons for modifying or removing a selected Veterinarian.

name: veterinarianList
desc: List of all veterinarians that are retrieved from the database.

name: AppDatabase
desc: Defines the main database configuration for the application.

name: vaccineDao
desc:
Provides access to the VaccineDao, which contains
all database operations related to the Vaccine entity
(insert, delete, update, and query).

name: PetOwnerPage
desc: This is the main page for Pet Owners

name: createState
desc: Creates the mutable state for this widget at a given location in the tree.

name: ID
desc:
Static counter used to assign unique IDs.
Always stays ahead of the highest ID loaded from the database.

name: address
desc: Pet owner's home address.

name: dateOfBirth
desc: Pet owner's date of birth

name: firstName
desc: Pet owner's first name.

name: id
desc: Primary key for the database record.

name: insuranceNumber
desc: Optional pet insurance number. Empty string if none.

name: lastName
desc: Pet owner's last name.

name: PetOwnerDAO
desc:
Data Access Object for PetOwner database operations.
Provides insert, query, update, and delete methods.

name: deletePetOwner
desc: Deletes a PetOwner record from the database.

name: findAllPetOwners
desc: Returns all PetOwner records from the database.

name: insertPetOwner
desc: Inserts a new PetOwner into the database.

name: updatePetOwner
desc: Updates an existing PetOwner record in the database.

name: databaseBuilder
desc:
Creates a database builder for a persistent database.
Once a database is built, you should keep a reference to it and re-use it.

name: inMemoryDatabaseBuilder
desc:
Creates a database builder for an in memory database.
Information stored in an in memory database disappears when the process is killed.
Once a database is built, you should keep a reference to it and re-use it.

desc: Adds a database Callback to the builder.
